message:
docs(schema): update top-level command description

`br schema --help` was still showing "Emit JSON Schemas for br output types"
even after the per-command envelope map landed in a58633d3. Updated the
clap doc comment so `br schema --help` and `br --help` both reflect the
expanded scope.

(The per-variant value-enum docs already mention the command map; this
fixes the parent command's one-liner that shows in `br --help`.)
